description: Shutterstock is a stock media platform that provides images, video, music, and related media assets. Its developer offering lets customers search, preview, license, and download media and manage related account resources.
summary: Shutterstock exposes a REST API at https://api.shutterstock.com, a Python-based `shutterstock` CLI for the same API, and a public MCP server at https://www.shutterstock.com/gciq/mcp.
